summary: New UI features testing complete - All backend tests passed (11/11). All frontend tests passed. Bug fix: Loyalty system case sensitivity issue fixed in server.py. New features tested: 1) Tourism/Attractions section (Znamenitosti) with 5 cards and horizontal scroll, 2) Leaderboard section (Top u Gradačcu) with ranked list by rating, 3) Loyalty points card displaying user points.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/tourism/attractions returns 5 attractions with id, name, description, category fields
✓ GET /api/leaderboard returns locations sorted by avg_rating descending, only shows locations with review_count > 0
✓ GET /api/loyalty/{name} returns user loyalty data with points, total_visits, visits array
✓ POST /api/loyalty/checkin awards 10 points per visit and tracks location visits
✓ BUG FIXED: Loyalty system case sensitivity - changed line 601 from inp.user_name to inp.user_name.lower()
✓ Frontend displays 'Top u Gradačcu' section with rank badges, star ratings, review counts
✓ Frontend displays 'Znamenitosti' section with horizontal scroll, building icons, category badges
✓ Frontend displays loyalty card when user has points > 0 (trophy icon, points count)
✓ All sections have proper testIDs (leader-{id}, attraction-{id})
✓ Leaderboard cards are clickable and navigate to location detail page
✓ Horizontal scroll working on attractions section
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_tourism_leaderboard_loyalty.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features (11 tests)
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed loyalty system case sensitivity bug (line 601)
seed_data_creation: Test loyalty checkins created for users: TEST_NewUser_12345, TEST_LoyaltyUser_67890, TEST_StructureCheck_99999, FixTestUser. Loyalty points awarded and verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new UI features fully functional. Tourism/Attractions section shows 5 attractions with horizontal scroll. Leaderboard shows top locations by rating (only those with reviews). Loyalty card displays when user has points. Bug fix: Loyalty system now correctly stores and retrieves points (case sensitivity issue resolved). All previous features still working correctly.

rca_of_issue.bug: Loyalty system not persisting points correctly
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Case sensitivity mismatch in MongoDB query and $set operation. Query used inp.user_name.lower() but $set used inp.user_name (original case). This caused the document to be created with original case user_name, but queries used lowercase, so they didn't match.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Changed server.py line 601 from '$set': {'user_name': inp.user_name} to '$set': {'user_name': inp.user_name.lower()} to ensure consistency between query and stored data.
rca_of_issue.verification: Created test user 'FixTestUser', checked in, verified points persisted correctly. All 11 backend tests now pass including test_loyalty_checkin_and_verify.
